defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2012 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.physdesc: Correspondence, business and accounting records, photographs, newspaper clippings, audio recordings, and publications.
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Correspondence, business and accounting records relating the the operation of the Taylor Wine Company in Hammondsport, N.Y. Letters, notes, and statistics in wine advertising for and by Taylor Wine Company and D'Arcy Advertising Company.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, business and accounting records relating the the operation of the Taylor Wine Company in Hammondsport. Letters, notes, and statistics in wine advertising for and by Taylor Wine Company and D'Arcy Advertising Company. Also included are magazine clippings, newspapers, photos, negatives, audio recordings, articles, meeting reports, school coursework and publications. The collection shows the success of the company through smart and extensive marketing. Notable figures in this collection are Walter S. Taylor, Grayton H. Taylor, and William L. Rech.

Also included in this collection are Taylor family photographs, personal correspondence and school papers written by Walter Taylor, along with a set of autographed prints by H. Hawkins of early aviation.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Forms part of the Eastern Wine and Grape Archive. (EWGA)

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: ‡3 See also the Greyton H. Taylor Wine Museum at Bully Hill Vineyards in Hammondsport, N.Y. for additional archival material and photographs of the Taylor Wine Company and Taylor family.

did.unittitle: Data from studies involving corks with John Barnard

scopecontent.p: Describes the art of wine making in New York State and the Taylor Wine Company. VHS print of original 1939 16mm film. DVD copy available in collection #6695, DVD 169.
Betacam SP print of original 1939 16mm film. DVD copy available in collection #6695, DVD 169.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Taylor Wine Company records, #6718. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
